flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Albany State University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (22.8% vs 39.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Albany State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Albany State University rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (11.3% → 14.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Albany State University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (65.1% → 78.6%).
